## Checklist

- [ ] The link is canonical (official repository, paper, documentation, or project page) and uses HTTPS.
- [ ] The description is neutral and avoids hype.
- [ ] The entry avoids unsafe biological procedural detail (see SECURITY.md).
- [ ] README formatting, section order, and alphabetical order (where practical) are preserved.
- [ ] The entry is not a duplicate and the link resolves.
